title: [fr-FR] Style Studio
description: [fr-FR] Style Studio offers many helpful tools to help you create your next color and font design system, or fine tune your current one.

title: [fr-FR] Site Mapper
description: [fr-FR] Site Mapper helps you to quickly export your website frames into a fully functional sitemap automatically linked to your project frames.

title: [fr-FR] Lorem Ipsum
description: [fr-FR] Fill your designs with placeholders in a click: text, images and even data!

title: [fr-FR] Iconify
description: [fr-FR] Import Material Design Icons, FontAwesome, Jam Icons, EmojiOne, Twitter Emoji and many other icons (more than 150 icon sets containing over 200,000 icons) to Figma document as vector shapes.

title: [fr-FR] Shadow Maker
description: [fr-FR] Generate beautiful, smooth shadows with direction, color, and opacity controls.

title: [fr-FR] Snapshot
description: [fr-FR] Create a Snapshot from any layer, and turn it into an image — whilst rotating/flipping it and converting it to the correct perspective all at once.
